title: unona odorata
intro: Unona odorata, also known as the fragrant frangipani or frangipani tree, is a tropical evergreen tree native to Asia and Australia. The medicinal properties of Unona odorata include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Unona odorata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
